title: Teradyne (TER) Up 14.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Teradyne (TER) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Teradyne board says president will succeed CEO in February
text: Teradyne Inc. [S: TER] said late Tuesday its board chose Gregory Smith to succeed Mark Jagiela as chief executive effective Feb. 1, 2023. Smith will also become a board member on that date.

title: Teradyne Announces CEO Succession
text: NORTH READING, Mass., Nov. 15, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Teradyne (Nasdaq: TER) Board of Directors today named Gregory Smith to succeed Mark E. Jagiela as CEO effective February 1, 2023. Mr. Smith will join the Board of Directors on the same date.

title: Ernest E. Maddock Elected to Teradyne's Board of Directors
text: NORTH READING, Mass., Nov. 02, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) announced the election of Ernest E. Maddock to its Board of Directors effective November 14, 2022. Mr. Maddock was also appointed to the Board's Audit Committee.
